All paths use `./CLAUDE.md`, `module-5/...`, `judges/...` — explicit subpath discipline observed.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Name the consumer at write time.

notes: Module file is mostly include-link; technical surface is the Debrief prompt + the maintainer source-verification block. (1) Debrief prompt's six file paths all exist as exercise outputs in `hallucination-bakeoff.md`. Scoreboard chat-print + file-write coexist correctly. (2) Mata/Deloitte URLs ARE present in the linked prework lecture (`lectures/module-5-prework.md` lines 24–25, 40–41); the maintainer block's 'Source-verification owed' TODO is stale. Single non-blocking TODO: reword/close the source-verification block to point at the prework lecture as canonical citation surface, or move it there entirely. (3) Justia returns 403 to curl HEAD/GET (bot-block) but the URL is live in browsers and CourtListener fallback is documented in the prework maintainer block.
